Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}At Mayoido Antiques, you can conduct Item Fusions and Item Exchanges.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Item Fusions involve expending one weapon part and a handful of required materials to create a unique piece of equipment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}In the Item Exchange, the proprietor will take any gemstones off your hands in exchange for items.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Materials that are used in Item Fusions can often be found in the Abyss of Time, so you'll be able to collect them as you explore.[n]{f 1 1}
